notes: Threat model exercised. Bot-token-never-in-payload constraint pinned by test. Bridge fail-closed on missing token / chat_id / enabled. SSE stream install-token gated via same _authorized path as the rest of /api/*. No real Telegram call in tests.
controls_verified: load_config() returns bot_token_configured / chat_id_configured booleans only -- raw token/chat_id never in HTTP response
send() refuses on disabled config, missing token, and per_event=false
SSE stream install-token gated (?token= query param since browsers cannot add EventSource headers)
SSE rate-limit exempted (long-lived) but still auth-gated
Subscriber exception in one callback never breaks others (test-pinned)
Ring buffer bounded at 100 -- no unbounded memory growth
